embed.title: !profile
embed.description: Separate sets of tracking rules that you can switch between — e.g. one profile for home, another for work, another for weekends.

fields.name: View
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}profile list` — list your profiles
`{{prefix}}profile` — show current profile

fields.name: Create, switch, delete
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}profile add work` — create a new profile named "work"
`{{prefix}}profile switch work` — make "work" the active profile
`{{prefix}}profile remove work` — delete "work" and its tracking

fields.name: Auto-switch by time
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}profile settime mon09:00 tue18:30 weekday09:00 weekend10:00`

Times are when the profile becomes active. Use `monHH:MM`, `weekdayHH:MM`, `weekendHH:MM` — the processor switches profiles automatically at those times each day.

fields.name: Copy between profiles
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}profile copyto work` — copy the current profile's tracking to "work"
`{{prefix}}profile copyto all` — copy to every other profile
